title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
